parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: This check box enables the serial connection.

parameters.name: port
parameters.label: Port
parameters.description: Selects the COM port that the serial connection will use.  Default port names 1 through 8 are available in the popup menu, though any name can be manually entered in this field.

parameters.name: baudrate
parameters.label: Baud Rate
parameters.description: The maximum number of bits of information, including "control" bits, that are transmitted per second. Check your input device's default baud rate and set accordingly.

parameters.name: databits
parameters.label: Data Bits
parameters.description: This parameter sets the number of data bits sent in each. Data bits are transmitted "backwards". Backwards refers to the order of transmission, which is from least significant bit (LSB) to most signif

parameters.name: parity
parameters.label: Parity
parameters.description: This parameter can be set to none, even, or odd. The optional parity bit follows the data bits and is included as a simple means of error checking. Parity bits work by specifying ahead of time whether

parameters.name: stopbits
parameters.label: Stop Bits
parameters.description: The last part of transmission packet consists of 1 or 2 Stop bits. The connection will now wait for the next Start bit.

parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: The Callbacks will execute once for each message received.

parameters.name: executeloc
parameters.label: Execute from
parameters.description: Determines the location the script is run from.

parameters.name: fromop
parameters.label: From Operator
parameters.description: The path that the script will be executed from if the Execute From parameter is set to Specified .

parameters.name: clamp
parameters.label: Clamp Output
parameters.description: The is limited to 100 messages by default but with Clamp Output, this can be set to anything including unlimited.

parameters.name: maxlines
parameters.label: Maximum Lines
parameters.description: Limits the number of messages, older messages are removed from the list first.

parameters.name: clear
parameters.label: Clear Output
parameters.description: Deletes all lines except the heading. To clear with a script command, here is an example:

parameters.name: bytes
parameters.label: Bytes Column
parameters.description: Outputs the raw bytes of the message in a separate column.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
